issue_summary: Throw exception from optimizers that do not support simple bounds. Changing visibility of "parseOptimizationData" method to "protected" in order to allow the parent class to parse its data before the subclass (and thus providing more flexibility: the subclass is able check input consistency at the options parsing step).
